content: cross-rs GitHub Actions workflow: install cross with 'cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross' or houseabsolute/actions-rust-cross@v1 which wraps cross with automatic detection. Matrix flag 'use_cross: true' triggers cross instead of cargo. houseabsolute/actions-rust-cross: on Linux non-native targets uses cross, on macOS uses native cargo. Supports aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu explicitly. More ergonomic than managing cross directly. Version: @v0 is stable release action.
